options.a: The slotted planar array has a considerably smaller beam width.
options.b: The parabolic reflector has a considerably smaller beam width.
options.c: A parabolic antenna is preferred over a slotted planar array on aircraft due to its smaller side lobes and superior ability to display weather phenomena and map ground terrain.
options.d: A slotted planar array is preferred over a parabolic antenna on aircraft due to its superior ability to display weather phenomena and map ground terrain.
